hooks.command: f="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; [ "${f##*.}" = "py" ] || exit 0; [ -f pyproject.toml ] || { echo "当前目录缺少 pyproject.toml。" >&2; exit 2; }; ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; ruff check --fix "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; out=$(ruff check "$f" 2>&1); rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 0 ] || { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }
